text.title: vision-basics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for vision-basics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: VLMs cannot read file metadata (EXIF, PDF author, creation date).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: If your agent needs metadata, extract it with Pillow or PyMuPDF in a separate step before or after the VLM call.

failure-mode.description: JSON schema compliance via prompt alone is unreliable.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always parse with try/except and re-prompt with the specific parse error if validation fails.

failure-mode.description: Image size limits are per-image, not per-request.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A request with 10 images at 4.9MB each can still fail if the provider enforces a total payload cap.

failure-mode.description: Base64 encoding of a 5MB JPEG becomes ~7MB of text — request size bloats.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Monitor request size to avoid payload cap failures.

failure-mode.description: Anthropic API image size cap is 5MB (not 20MB like OpenAI).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pre-check before routing to Claude models.

failure-mode.description: For financial or legal document extraction, not requiring human review on low confidence.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require human review when confidence is "low" or extracted amounts exceed a business threshold before writing to any system of record.

failure-mode.description: When comparing multiple images (e.g., before/after, product variants), not labeling them explicitly.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Label each image explicitly in the prompt ("Image 1:", "Image 2:") — VLMs lose track without explicit labels.
